features.description: Base capability. Every tenant reads the platform-seeded catalog (30+ sports across 10 categories). Always on across every tier.

Tenant admin can create custom Sport / Discipline / Position rows beyond the platform catalog. Enterprise-only. Backed by the `sports_registry_custom` entitlement + the `sports_registry_custom_slot` slot cap.
Tenant can call GET /api/v1/sports/resolve to preview whether a (sport_key, discipline_key, position_key) triple exists in the catalog. All tiers — every Wave 3 write flow uses the resolver.
The tenant UI shows a discipline picker under each Sport (a football team can pick 11v11 / futsal / 5v5). All tiers.

The tenant UI shows a position picker under each Discipline (an athlete enrollment can pick goalkeeper / defender / midfielder / forward). Medium+ — Small tier uses a simplified enrollment form without position slots.

Sport detail pages surface the governing body (FIFA / FIBA / FINA / …) with a link + logo. Enterprise-only. Medium tenants see sports without governance metadata; Enterprise tenants (typically federation-affiliated) benefit from the extra context.
Sport / Discipline / Position names surface in the caller's active locale (Arabic, French, Spanish, …). Backed by the localization module's HasTranslations trait. All tiers.
